name: Synbiotic Supplementation With Heyndrickxia coagulans TBC169 Improves Chronic Constipation in Middle-Aged and Elderly.
summary: A 2026 randomized double-blind controlled trial in 140 participants aged at least 45 years with chronic constipation, testing a Heyndrickxia coagulans TBC169 synbiotic plus dietary-fiber components against dietary fiber alone.
